title: Instagram API Authentication Failure
symptom: The workflow fails with a 'Bad Authentication' error when trying to send DMs. This indicates that the API key or credentials are incorrect or missing.
applies_when: Sending messages via HTTP request node
not_this_if: No errors in other parts of the workflow
root_cause: The error occurs when the HTTP request node does not include the necessary authentication headers, which are required for the Instagram API to validate the request. This can happen if the headers are not set up correctly in the node configuration.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP request node settings
Ensure that the correct authentication headers are included
Check the API documentation for required headers
agent_instruction: Add the necessary authentication headers to the HTTP request node for the Instagram API.
